name: p3_warm_day_natvent_band_stays_armed
description: Issue #249 P3: Warm day with window open triggers nat-vent (fan on). The comfort band remains armed in heat_cool mode — no HVAC off command. Fan circulates fresh air; thermostat self-manages within the band.
notes: (a) Scenario effectiveness: if _apply_comfort_band is reverted to HVAC-off on nat-vent activation,
comfort_band_armed at 08:05 fails (thermostat turned off instead of band-armed).
If _natural_vent_active is not set True, nat_vent_still_active fails.
(b) Docs↔production alignment: sensor_opened now carries hvac_mode_change 'off→band-armed'
(not 'off→off'); any doc describing nat-vent as HVAC-off must be updated.
(c) Occupant experience: without band-armed during nat-vent, the thermostat drops to off and the
home could overheat if outdoor temps rise mid-day. Band arm ensures a ceiling fallback.
Regression proof: remove comfort_band_applied from sensor_opened path → comfort_band_armed at

events.note: Morning: outdoor 65F well below indoor 74F — nat-vent eligible.
Warm-day classification. Band armed at [62/76]. windows_recommended=false so sensor_open goes through the nat-vent eligibility check (not the planned-period bypass).
User opens window per recommendation: outdoor 65F < indoor 74F, indoor > comfort_heat=70F — nat-vent activates.
Mid-morning: outdoor still below indoor, nat-vent running. Band still armed.

assertions.reason: sensor_open: outdoor 65F < indoor 74F, indoor > comfort_heat=70F, outdoor <= threshold 79F — nat-vent activates (fan on).
P3: band remains armed after nat-vent activation. Fan circulates air; thermostat holds the [70/76] band. If band were dropped (HVAC off), the ceiling guard would not fire when outdoor rises.
10 AM: outdoor still below indoor, nat-vent not exited. _natural_vent_active=True.
Band must still be [comfort_heat=70/comfort_cool=76] at 10 AM — nat-vent does not change the thermostat's band setpoints. Occupied+awake uses the full comfort band.

verdict.summary: P3: nat-vent activates (fan on) and comfort band stays armed [70/76] — no HVAC-off command on window open
verdict.observed_behavior: classification_applied; sensor_opened→natural_ventilation; _natural_vent_active=True; comfort_band_applied [70/76] persists; no set_hvac_mode(off)
verdict.expected_behavior: Occupant opens windows per recommendation — fan circulates; thermostat self-manages within the full comfort band. If outdoor eventually rises, ceiling guard escalates to AC with the band already set.
